menu.title: 📋 Dansday Bot Menu
menu.description: Select a feature from the buttons below:
menu.noAccess: ❌ You don't have access to any features.

panel.title: Dansday Bot Panel
panel.description: Click **Menu** to access bot features based on your role permissions.
panel.setupHasOwnerAccount: ✅ Bot interface sent to {channel}. This server already has an owner account — sign in on the web panel. No new invite was created.
panel.setupOwnerInviteReady:
✅ Bot interface sent to {channel}.

Only you can see this. Unused owner invite links expire **10 minutes** after they are created.

[**Click here to register as owner**]({url})
panel.setupWarnNoBotConfig: ⚠️ Interface sent, but bot config is not available.
panel.setupWarnNoServer: ⚠️ Interface sent, but could not find server record to generate invite.
panel.setupWarnNoBaseUrl: ⚠️ Interface sent, but BASE_URL is not configured — cannot generate invite link.

errors.featureDisabled: ❌ This feature is turned off for this server. An administrator can enable it in the bot configuration panel.
errors.buttonError: ❌ **Button Error**: An error occurred while processing your button click.\n\nPlease try again or contact an administrator.
errors.modalError: ❌ **Modal Error**: An error occurred while processing your form submission.\n\nPlease try again or contact an administrator.
errors.selectionError: ❌ **Selection Error**: An error occurred while processing your selection.\n\nPlease try again or contact an administrator.

denied.title: ❌ **Permission Denied**
denied.description: You need one of the following roles to use **{action}**:\n{roles}
denied.footer: Please contact a server administrator if you believe this is an error.

errors.notRegistered: ⚠️ This server is not registered with the bot. Please run a sync first.
errors.memberNotFound: ❌ Failed to fetch member information. Please try again.
errors.noData: ⚠️ No leveling data found for this member.
errors.createRecordFailed: ❌ Failed to create member record. Please try again.

current.title: ⏸️ You are currently AFK
current.howToRemoveValue: • Click the button below to remove AFK\n• Send any message (auto-removes AFK and unmutes)\n• AFK removal will automatically unmute you if bot muted you

set.title: ✅ AFK Status Set!
set.howToRemoveValue: • Send any message (auto-removes AFK and unmutes)\n• Click AFK button and remove (will unmute if bot muted you)\n• Removing AFK automatically unmutes you if you were muted by the bot
set.voiceMutedDeafened: \n\nYou will be muted and deafened in voice.
set.voiceMutedOnly: \n\nYou will be muted in voice (not deafened).

removed.title: ✅ AFK Status Removed!
removed.description: Welcome back! Your AFK status has been removed.

modal.messagePlaceholder: e.g., Taking a break, Studying, etc.
modal.deafenPlaceholder: yes or no (leave empty for yes)

errors.disabledOnServer: ❌ AFK is turned off for this server. An administrator can enable it in the bot configuration panel.

messages.welcomeBack: ✅ Welcome back, {member}! Your AFK status has been removed.

create.title: 🎉 Create Giveaway
create.step1Description: Select roles that can enter this giveaway from the dropdown below. Leave empty or click "Continue to Form" to allow all roles.

active.title: 🎉 Active Giveaway Found
active.description:
You already have an active giveaway:

**{title}**
**Prize:** {prize}

What would you like to do?

created.title: ✅ Giveaway Created!
created.description: Your giveaway has been created and posted in {channel}!

entered.title: ✅ Entered Giveaway!
entered.description: You have successfully entered the giveaway! Good luck! 🍀

errors.activeExists: ❌ You already have an active giveaway. Please finish it first.
errors.invalidDuration: ❌ **Invalid Giveaway**\n\nDuration must be a positive number (in minutes).
errors.invalidWinnerCount: ❌ **Invalid Giveaway**\n\nWinner count must be a positive number.
errors.channelNotConfigured: ❌ Failed to create giveaway: Giveaway channel not configured. Please configure it in the panel.
errors.channelNotFound: ❌ Failed to create giveaway: Giveaway channel not found.
errors.channelError: ❌ Failed to create giveaway: Error retrieving giveaway channel configuration.
errors.notFound: ❌ Giveaway not found or has already ended.
errors.roleRestriction:
❌ **Role Restriction**

This giveaway is restricted to the following roles:
{roles}

You need all of these roles to enter.
errors.memberNotFoundDB: ❌ Member not found in database. Please try again later.
errors.cannotEnterOwn: ❌ You cannot enter your own giveaway!
errors.alreadyEntered: ❌ You have already entered this giveaway!
errors.finishOwnOnly: ❌ You can only finish your own giveaways.

modal.title: 💬 Submit Feedback
modal.label: Your Feedback
modal.placeholder: Please share your feedback, suggestions, or concerns...

submitted.title: ✅ Feedback Submitted!
submitted.description: Thank you for your feedback! Your feedback has been submitted successfully.

errors.channelError: ❌ Failed to submit feedback: Error retrieving feedback channel configuration.
errors.channelNotConfigured: ❌ Failed to submit feedback: Feedback channel not configured.
errors.channelNotFound: ❌ Failed to submit feedback: Feedback channel not found.

staffRating.title: 📋 Report Staff Member
staffRating.selectStaffPlaceholder: Choose a staff member to report...

reviewModal.reasonPlaceholder: Explain your decision to the reporter…

modal.title: Report Staff Member
modal.categoryPlaceholder: helpful, unhelpful, abuse, slow_response, excellent, rude
modal.descriptionPlaceholder: Please describe your experience with this staff member...

submitted.title: ✅ Report Submitted
submitted.description: Your report has been submitted successfully and is now waiting for admin approval. We'll notify you once it's been reviewed.

errors.noStaffSelected: ❌ Please select a staff member to report.
errors.invalidRating: ❌ **Invalid Rating**\n\nRating must be a number between 1 and 5.
errors.invalidCategory: ❌ **Invalid Category**\n\nPlease use one of: helpful, unhelpful, abuse, slow_response, excellent, rude
errors.emptyDescription: ❌ **Description Required**\n\nPlease provide a description of your experience.
errors.notStaff: ❌ The selected member is not a staff member.
errors.notConfigured: ❌ Staff rating system is not configured for this server.
errors.noStaffConfigured: ❌ Staff roles are not configured for this server. Please ask an admin to configure staff permissions first.
errors.noStaffAvailable: ❌ No staff members could be found right now. Please try again later or contact a server admin.
errors.missingRating: ❌ Please select a rating before continuing.
errors.missingCategory: ❌ Please select a category before continuing.
errors.permissionDenied: ❌ **Permission Denied**\n\nYou need admin permissions to approve or reject staff reports.
errors.reviewReasonRequired: ❌ Please enter a reason for your decision.

list.title: 🎬 Content Creators
list.description: Approved content creators for this server:

dismiss.confirmDescription:
You will lose the Content Creator role on this server. You can apply again later if staff allow it.

**Are you sure?**
dismiss.removed: ✅ Your Content Creator role was removed.

reviewModal.reasonPlaceholder: Explain your decision to the applicant…

channelEmbed.autoRejectReviewReason: Duplicate or impersonation: this TikTok username is already linked to another Discord account.
channelEmbed.autoRejectConflictPending: That account has a **pending** application for this TikTok handle.
channelEmbed.autoRejectConflictApproved: That account is an **approved** content creator using this TikTok handle.

modal.title: Apply as Content Creator
modal.reasonLabel: Why do you want to become a content creator?
modal.reasonPlaceholder: Tell us briefly why you should be accepted...

contentCreator.submitted: ✅ Your content creator application for **{username}** was submitted and is waiting for staff approval.

dm.approved:
Your application in **{server}** was approved.

TikTok: **{username}**
Your Content Creator role has been assigned.
dm.rejected:
Your application in **{server}** was not approved this time.

TikTok: **{username}**

**Reason:** {reason}

You can apply again after the cooldown period (if your server uses one).

contentCreator.autoRejectApplicantReason: Duplicate or impersonation: this TikTok username is already linked to another Discord account.

errors.notConfigured: ❌ Content creator admission is not configured for this server.
errors.alreadyCreator: ✅ You already have the Content Creator role on this server.
errors.invalidUsername: ❌ TikTok username is invalid. Use letters, numbers, dots, and underscores only.
errors.reasonRequired: ❌ Please provide your reason for becoming a content creator.
errors.pendingExists: ❌ You already have a pending content creator application.
errors.cooldown: ❌ You must wait **{days} day(s)** before submitting another content creator application.
errors.submitFailed: ❌ Failed to submit content creator application: {error}
errors.permissionDenied: ❌ You need admin permissions to approve or reject content creator applications.
errors.reviewReasonRequired: ❌ Please enter a reason for your decision.

notifications.title: 🔔 Notification Preferences
notifications.description: Select which channels you want to receive notifications for. You will get the selected roles assigned to you.
notifications.updated: ✅ Your notification preferences have been updated.

errors.notConfigured: ❌ Notifications are not configured for this server.
errors.noRoles: ❌ No notification channels are set up yet. Ask an admin to configure notifications in the dashboard.

existing.title: 💎 Custom Supporter Role
existing.description: You already have a custom role: **{roleName}**\n\nChoose an action:

created.title: ✅ Custom Supporter Role Created!
created.description: Your custom role **{roleName}** has been created and assigned to you!{iconWarning}
created.iconWarningBoost: \n\n⚠️ **Custom Icon Not Available:** This server needs Level 2 Server Boost to use custom role icons (images). You can use an emoji instead!
created.iconWarningGeneric: \n\n⚠️ **Note:** Icon could not be set, but role was created successfully.

updated.title: ✅ Custom Supporter Role Updated!
updated.description: Your custom role **{roleName}** has been updated!{iconWarning}
updated.iconWarningBoost: \n\n⚠️ **Custom Icon Not Available:** This server needs Level 2 Server Boost to use custom role icons (images). You can use an emoji instead!
updated.iconWarningGeneric: \n\n⚠️ **Note:** Icon could not be set, but role was updated successfully.

deleted.title: ✅ Custom Supporter Role Deleted
deleted.description: Your custom role **{roleName}** has been deleted.

errors.noRole: ❌ You don't have a custom role to edit.
errors.noRoleDelete: ❌ You don't have a custom role to delete.
errors.invalidName: ❌ **Invalid Role Name**\n\nRole name must be between 1 and 100 characters.
errors.boostRequired:
❌ **Custom Icon Not Available**

This server needs **Level 2 Server Boost** to use custom role icons (images).

💡 **Tip:** You can use an **emoji** instead (like 🔥, ⭐, or any custom emoji) which doesn't require server boosts.
errors.boostRequiredCreate:
❌ **Server Boost Required**

This server needs **Level 2 Server Boost** to create custom supporter roles with certain features.

💡 **What you can do:**
- Ask server administrators to boost the server to Level 2
- Or contact server staff for assistance

**Error details:** {error}
errors.createFailed:
❌ **Failed to Create Role**

Error: {error}

Please make sure:
- The bot has permission to create roles
- The bot has permission to manage roles
- Role position constraints are valid
errors.updateFailed:
❌ **Failed to Update Role**

Error: {error}

Please make sure:
- The bot has permission to manage roles
- Role constraints are valid
errors.failed: ❌ Failed to open role creation form: {error}

questEnroll.alreadyClaimedDescription: You enrolled in **{questName}** previously and your reward has already been claimed. Each quest can only be claimed once per member.
questEnroll.pendingDescription:
A result embed will be posted in this channel shortly.

Your token is **not** saved in our database.

**Risk:** Discord may restrict or ban the **user account** tied to that token; in some cases the **bot or server** could also be affected. This is not official Discord behaviour — you chose to proceed.
questEnroll.precheckNotFoundDescription: This quest is not listed for the Discord account tied to your token. Open **Discord → Quests**, accept the quest if needed, then try again.
questEnroll.precheckExpiredDescription: This quest has expired for that Discord account.
questEnroll.precheckRewardClaimedDescription: The reward for this quest was already claimed on this **Discord account** (for example after finishing in another server or in the Discord client). Auto-enroll cannot claim it again.
questEnroll.precheckCompletedDescription: Quest objectives are already completed on this **Discord account**. Claim any remaining reward under **Discord → Quests** if you have not yet — auto-enroll cannot add more progress.
